title: Working with Status Column Indices
excerpt: I noticed that status columns are referenced by index, which is assigned based on status color. There was a previous post on this (Working with the Status Column), however it seems that the information is no longer avail…

posts.author: nntcao (Nathan Cao)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed that status columns are referenced by index, which is assigned based on status color. There was a previous post on this (Working with the Status Column), however it seems that the information is no longer available.

How can I query which labels belong to which index in a column of type “status”?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
{
  boards(ids: YOUR BOARD ID) {
    columns(ids: "status") {
      settings_str
      title
    }
  }
}

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nntcao, was that the information you needed?

Thank you @basdebruin !!!
